channel.title: Waythrough Project Blog
channel.description: Practical guidance for navigating affordable housing programs, tenant rights, and the barriers that stand in the way.

item.title: How Section 8 Inspections Work (And How to Pass Yours)
item.description: HQS inspections can make or break your housing search. Here's exactly what inspectors look for, common fail items, and how to prepare so your unit passes the first time.
item.author: matt@waythroughproject.com (Matt)

item.title: Renting With an Eviction on Your Record: What Actually Works
item.description: An eviction on your record doesn't mean you can't find housing. Here's what landlords actually see, how to address it, and programs that give second chances.
item.author: matt@waythroughproject.com (Matt)

item.title: My Income Went Up on Section 8 — Will I Lose My Voucher?
item.description: A raise doesn't automatically mean losing your voucher. Here's how rent gets recalculated, when to report changes, and how the Family Self-Sufficiency program works.
item.author: matt@waythroughproject.com (Matt)

item.title: I Need a Place to Stay Tonight — Here's What to Do
item.description: If you need emergency shelter right now, here are the numbers to call, the programs that can help tonight, and what to expect when you get there.
item.author: matt@waythroughproject.com (Matt)

item.title: How to Survive the Section 8 Waiting List
item.description: The waiting list can take years. Here's how to check your status, keep your spot, apply to multiple PHAs, and find alternatives while you wait.
item.author: matt@waythroughproject.com (Matt)

item.title: Reasonable Accommodations: What They Are and How to Get One
item.description: If you have a disability, you have the right to request changes to housing rules or physical modifications. Here's how the process works and what to do if you're denied.
item.author: matt@waythroughproject.com (Matt)

item.title: What Happens When Your Section 8 Voucher Expires
item.description: Your Section 8 voucher has an expiration date. Here's what happens when time runs out, how to get an extension, and what to do if you've already lost your voucher.
item.author: matt@waythroughproject.com (Matt)

item.title: Why Housing Changes Everything
item.description: Housing isn't just a roof — it's the foundation that makes recovery, employment, safety, and stability possible. Real stories from my years working with veterans.
item.author: matt@waythroughproject.com (Matt)

item.title: 7 Section 8 Myths That Need to Die
item.description: Free housing? Tenants don't pay rent? Can't work while on Section 8? Let's put these misconceptions to rest with the actual facts.
item.author: matt@waythroughproject.com (Matt)

item.title: The Benefits Cliff: What It Is and How to Plan for It
item.description: What happens when a raise pushes you past income thresholds for SNAP, Medicaid, or Section 8 — and how to plan ahead.
item.author: matt@waythroughproject.com (Matt)

item.title: Your PHA Won't Call Back? Here's What to Do
item.description: When the housing authority isn't returning your calls, here's how to escalate — different contact methods, documentation, and legal aid.
item.author: matt@waythroughproject.com (Matt)

item.title: What Housing First Actually Means (And Why It Works)
item.description: Housing without preconditions. Why the evidence supports it, and what it looks like in practice through programs like HUD-VASH.
item.author: matt@waythroughproject.com (Matt)

item.title: 15 Tips for Finding an Apartment with a Housing Voucher
item.description: Practical, actionable tips for the apartment search — from knowing your payment standard to negotiating with landlords.
item.author: matt@waythroughproject.com (Matt)

item.title: What Happens After You Get Your Housing Voucher
item.description: You got your voucher — now what? The apartment search, inspections, landlord negotiations, and everything you need to know about actually using your voucher.
item.author: matt@waythroughproject.com (Matt)

item.title: How to Talk to Your Landlord About Repairs Without Risking Retaliation
item.description: Practical strategies for getting repairs done while protecting yourself. When to call, when to write, and what to do if your landlord pushes back.
item.author: matt@waythroughproject.com (Matt)

item.title: Understanding Utility Allowances and Why They Matter
item.description: Utility allowances directly affect how much rent you pay on Section 8. Here's what they are, how they work, and what to do if yours doesn't match reality.
item.author: matt@waythroughproject.com (Matt)

item.title: What to Do If Your Benefits Get Cut
item.description: If your SSI, SSDI, SNAP, or housing benefits were reduced or cut off, here are the steps to take right now — including how to appeal and where to get help.
item.author: matt@waythroughproject.com (Matt)

item.title: Section 8 Explained — What It Actually Is and How It Works
item.description: A clear, no-nonsense breakdown of the Section 8 Housing Choice Voucher program — what it is, who qualifies, and how the process actually works from someone who's seen it firsthand.
item.author: matt@waythroughproject.com (Matt)

item.title: What to Do When a Landlord Rejects Your Voucher
item.description: Landlord won't accept your Section 8 voucher? Here's what you can do about it — your rights, your options, and how to keep moving forward.
item.author: matt@waythroughproject.com (Matt)

item.title: 5 Affordable Housing Programs Most People Don't Know About
item.description: Section 8 isn't your only option. Here are five federal housing programs that could help you — and that most people have never heard of.
item.author: matt@waythroughproject.com (Matt)

item.title: Welcome to Waythrough Project
item.description: Learn why Waythrough Project was started and what you can expect to find here to help navigate the affordable housing system.
item.author: matt@waythroughproject.com (Matt)
